{{Quote|Captain Drysso isn't here anymore, sir. Ah, this is acting-Captain Waroen.... If you could get the War Cruiser to stop shooting my engines, and if ''Virulence'' will pull us a bit further out into orbit so we don't crash of our own accord, we'll accept any conditions for surrender you want to offer us.|Lieutenant Waroen|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Waroen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] at the time of the [[Bacta War]].

A pale, red-haired young officer with a brisk, efficient manner, Waroen served as the primary aide to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Joak Drysso]] on the bridge of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' during the [[Battle of Thyferra]]. As the ship's lead [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] officer, he manned the primary sensor console; it was his duty to keep the ship's commander updated with the ship's situation during attacks.

As the battle drew to a close, Drysso brazenly declared himself a [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] and threatened to ram the damaged Super Star Destroyer into [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] itself. In reaction to this, Waroen shot and killed the elder officer, surrendering the ship to the [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|ex-Rogues]] under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].
